name: A Hero's Destiny
features: AutoFarm World 1 & 2: Automatically completes quests by targeting NPCs.
AutoQuest: Farms specific quests based on user-chosen levels.
AutoRebirth & Super Rebirth: Automates the rebirth processes to increase stats.
AutoTrain: Continuously trains your character to gain stats.
Anti-AFK: Keeps you active to avoid being kicked.
Server Hop: Automatically switches to a different public server.
Find Empty Server: Locates and joins an empty server.
Rejoin: Instantly rejoins the current server.

name: Driving Empire
features: AutoFarm Money: Automatically farm money on the map.
AutoFarm Race: Automatically farm all supported races.
Race Selection: Choose the race to farm via the menu.
Auto-spawn Vehicle: The script automatically spawns your vehicle if needed.
Auto Arrest Criminal: Automatically arrest criminals in the game.
Anti-AFK: Prevents automatic disconnection.
Server Hop: Automatically switches to a different public server.
Find Empty Server: Locates and joins an empty server.
Rejoin: Instantly rejoins the current server.

name: Loomian Legacy
features: AutoBattle: Engages in battles automatically based on user settings.
AutoCatch Loomians: Automatically catches Loomians during battles.
AutoTrain Loomians: Trains your Loomians to increase their stats.
Anti-AFK: Keeps you active to avoid being kicked.
Server Hop: Automatically switches to a different public server.
Find Empty Server: Locates and joins an empty server.
Rejoin: Instantly rejoins the current server.
